options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: -autoSyncMasterClone
options.description: Specify the objects used to sync-up master to clones.

options.name: -cellsForExtraSites
options.description: Specify cell names whose related sites will be created.

options.name: -checkTypes
options.description: Specify the check types for checkFPlan. Default is the basic.

options.name: -cutOffPlaceBlockageOutsideDie
options.description: When creating placement blockages, will cut the part outside of die and snap it by default.

options.name: -cutOffRouteBlockageOutsideDie
options.description: When creating routing blockages around inst/Hinst/Partition, will cut the part outside of die and snap it by default. If this option is set to false, don't cut and snap it.

options.name: -defaultBlockageNamePrefix
options.description: Name prefix for placement blockage and routing blockage.

options.name: -defaultPowerDomainSite
options.description: Create rows based on default power domain site instead of the design's default site.

options.name: -defaultRowPatternSite
options.description: Specify rows pattern.

options.name: -defaultTechSite
options.description: Specify a site as default technical site. After setting a forced one, the auto-calculating default-technical-site functionality will be disabled.

options.name: -enableRectilinearDesign
options.description: Specify whether design boundary can be changed to rectilinear shape.

options.name: -extraRowPattern
options.description: Specify row pattern site names which will be created.

options.name: -extraSites
options.description: Specify site names which will be created.

options.name: -firstRowSiteIndex
options.description: Specify the first row site to be created.

options.name: -includeIoWhenInitArea
options.description: Include IO cells when calculating the area of modules.

options.name: -initAllCompatibleCoreSiteRows
options.description: If true, initCoreRow will create all SITE with type core.

options.name: -keepRowsWhenMovingPowerDomain
options.description: specify whether to keep all existing rows in disjoint power domain when moving, resizing or reshaping a power domain on GUI or by command.

options.name: -lastRowSiteIndex
options.description: Specify the last row site to be created.

options.name: -maxIoHeight
options.description: Use maximum IO height to calculate a die box with IO placement. By default, minimum IO height is used.

options.name: -minimumSites
options.description: Specify the number of minimal sites (N) that checkFPlan will check for the same length site rule. When sameLengthSite is specified in checkTypes, this option is required.

options.name: -move_child_constraint_with_constraint
options.description: Specify child constraints move with parent constraint modules at the same time.

options.name: -move_macros_with_constraint
options.description: Specify macros move with constraint modules at the same time.

options.name: -move_preplaced_std_cell_only
options.description: Specify only pre-placed std cells move with constraint modules at the same time.

options.name: -move_std_cell_with_constraint
options.description: Specify std cells move with constraint modules at the same time.

options.name: -narrowChannelThreshold
options.description: Reports narrow channels whose width (in micros) is smaller than the specified value. When narrowChannel is specified in checkTypes, this option is required.

options.name: -no_cut_row
options.description: Specify no need to do cut row before other operations.

options.name: -powerRailLayer
options.description: Specify the layers for calculating power/ground on bottom attribute of cell or techsite. By default, the lowest metal layer is used.

options.name: -rowHeightIncrementCornerToCorner
options.description: Specify the offset value for user defined row height constraint with corner to corner edge.

options.name: -rowHeightIncrementIncornerToCorner
options.description: Specify the offset value for user defined row height constraint with incorner to corner edge.

options.name: -rowHeightIncrementIncornerToIncorner
options.description: Specify the offset value for user defined row height constraint with incorner to incorner edge.

options.name: -rowHeightMultiple
options.description: Specify the pitch value for user defined row height constraint.

options.name: -rowSiteHeight
options.description: Specify the odd even row height constraints.

options.name: -rowSiteWidth
options.description: Specify the odd even row width constraints.

options.name: -skipViolations
options.description: Specify message ID then the message will be not reported and shown in violation browser. (list, optional)

options.name: -snap_all_corners_to_grid
options.description: Specify to snap all corners of object to grid.

options.name: -snapBlockGrid
options.description: Specify the block snap rules. It can be set to snap to manufacture grid, instance grid, placement grid, user-define grid, layerTrack grid, finfet manufacture grid, finfet instance grid, finfet placement grid. The default is manufacturingGrid. For Finfet design, the default is finfetManufacturingGrid.

options.name: -snapConstraintGrid
options.description: Specify the constraint snap rules. It can be set to snap to manufacture grid, instance grid, placement grid, user-define grid, layerTrack grid, finfet manufacture grid, finfet instance grid, finfet placement grid. The default is instGrid. For Finfet design, the default is finfetInstGrid.

options.name: -snapCoreGrid
options.description: Specify the core snap rules. It can be set to snap to manufacture grid, instance grid, placement grid, user-define grid, layerTrack grid, finfet manufacture grid, finfet instance grid, finfet placement grid. The default is placementGrid. For Finfet design, the default is finfetPlacementGrid.

options.name: -snapDieGrid
options.description: Specify the die snap rules. It can be set to snap to manufacture grid, instance grid, placement grid, user-define grid, layerTrack grid, finfet manufacture grid, finfet instance grid, finfet placement grid. The default is placementGrid. For Finfet design, the default is finfetPlacementGrid.

options.name: -snapIoGrid
options.description: Specify the IO snap rules. It can be set to snap to manufacture grid, instance grid, placement grid, user-define grid, layerTrack grid, finfet manufacture grid, finfet instance grid, finfet placement grid. The default is manufacturingGrid. For Finfet design, the default is finfetManufacturingGrid.

options.name: -snapPlaceBlockageGrid
options.description: Specify the placement blockage snap rules. The default is inst.

options.name: -snapPlaceBlockageType
options.description: Specify the snapping type.

options.name: -user_define_grid
options.description: Specify the user-define grid. Format is {x_offset y_offset x_pitch y_pitch}. The x_offset y_offset is the offset of user-define grid. The x_pitch separates the vertical grid lines. The y_pitch separates the horizontal grid lines. The values are in microns.

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
